title: ‘She Considers Herself The Master And Us Her Servants’: This Rebel TMC MP Blows The Lid Off Mamata Banerjee’s Dictatorial Rule
description: The Trinamool Congress is facing an unprecedented collapse after its defeat in West Bengal. Rebel MPs and MLAs accuse Mamata Banerjee and Abhishek Banerjee of autocratic leadership, with 58 MLAs and 19 MPs breaking away to form separate blocs. The party’s internal mutiny signals a full‑scale dismantling of its political apparatus. This Rebel MP is revealing grim reality of Mamata's dictatorship.
